name: holographicautocomplete
title: Holographic Autocomplete
description: A "God-Tier" Autocomplete component inspired by HTML datalist. Features: - Holographic glassmorphic aesthetics. - Fuzzy-like filtering logic. - Keyboard navigation (Arrows, Enter, Escape). - Animated dropdown expansion.
